# AUTO-GENERATED by pm_costs.py — do not edit manually.
# One value_combat_unit_market_cost_<unit> SV per non-INJECT combat
# unit type in extra_combat_units.txt. Each per-good `add = { ... }`
# block scales the base contribution by (1 + market_goods_pricier).

value_combat_unit_market_cost_DEW_tank = {
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:tanks.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 36000 # base_price(120) × quantity(300)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:artillery.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 7000 # base_price(70) × quantity(100)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:radios.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 6400 # base_price(80) × quantity(80)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:oil.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 800 # base_price(40) × quantity(20)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:ammunition.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 5800 # base_price(50) × quantity(116)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:electronic_components.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 11200 # base_price(80) × quantity(140)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:robotics.market_goods_pricier

	add = {

		add = 1
		multiply = 20000 # base_price(4000) × quantity(5)
	}
}

		add = 1
		multiply = 2000 # base_price(50) × quantity(40)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:aeroplanes.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 20000 # base_price(160) × quantity(125)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:oil.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 800 # base_price(40) × quantity(20)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:radios.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 4000 # base_price(80) × quantity(50)
	}
	add = {
		value = this.market.mg:electronic_components.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1
		multiply = 3200 # base_price(80) × quantity(40)
	}
}

	}

		value = this.market.mg:ammunition.market_goods_pricier
		add = 1

	}

	}
